settings.headline: Real flowers, built today, walked to the door.
settings.lede: We hand-tie every bouquet at the bench, text you a photo before it leaves the shop, and walk it over the same day. No wire-service swaps. No closest-available. Just the bouquet on your screen, in your person's hands.

settings.title: Real florist. Real shop. Real hands.
settings.description: Not a wire service routing your order three states away. Every bouquet is built at the bench at 463 Fort Washington Ave.

settings.title: A photo before it leaves the shop.
settings.description: We text a quick photo of your actual bouquet, not a stock image, before it heads out the door. If it's not right, we remake it.

settings.title: Cut this morning. Built today.
settings.description: Our buyer is on the A train to the 28th Street market before sunrise. Stems land at the shop by 9, in your hands by 5.

settings.title: Family-owned. Two decades. One block.
settings.description: Bilingual, family-run on the corner of 187th since 2004. Walk in, call, or order online. By your second order we'll know your name.

settings.ribbon: Mother's Day · Día de las Madres · Sunday May 10
settings.headline:
Para Mami,
con todo nuestro cariño.
settings.body_es: Flores frescas entregadas hoy en todo Washington Heights. Toda la 10032, 10033, 10034 y 10040 antes de las cinco.
settings.body_en: Hand-tied bouquets built for the day, with a Spanish or English card in your handwriting (or ours). Order before 2 PM Saturday and we'll walk it over to Mami's apartment Sunday morning.

settings.headline: For the moments, not the flowers.
settings.intro: For the birthdays. For the apologies. For the just-because Tuesdays. Pick the moment, our designers build to the feeling. Ramos para cada momento.

settings.name: Just because
settings.copy: For the Tuesday gesture. For the neighbor across the hall.

settings.name: Birthday
settings.copy: Bright stems. Soft palette. Add a candle or balloon at checkout.

settings.name: Anniversary
settings.copy: Garden roses. Peonies. A proper ribbon. Same-day, same block.

settings.name: Sympathy
settings.copy: Direct to Ortiz, Schwartz Brothers, and every funeral home in upper Manhattan.

settings.name: Quinceañera
settings.copy: Centerpieces, corsages, the church arch. Custom-built. Quote within 24 hours.

settings.headline: This week, fresh in.
settings.intro: From the bench this week, ready to send today. Each one is built to order.

settings.name: Pink Garden Roses
settings.description: Garden roses, ranunculus, eucalyptus. Hand-tied with raffia.

settings.name: Para Mami
settings.description: Blush roses and pink peonies, kraft-wrapped, bilingual card.

settings.name: Sympathy Standing Spray
settings.description: White roses, lilies, carnations on easel. Direct to any funeral home.

settings.name: Designer's Choice
settings.description: Whatever was best at market this morning, arranged for you.

settings.headline: What you see is what they get.
settings.body: Every order gets a quick text or email of your actual bouquet, not a stock photo, the moment it's wrapped. If something looks off, we remake it. No bait and switch. No wire-service swaps. No "closest available." Just the bouquet on your screen, in your neighbor's hands.

settings.quote: "My friends make the most beautiful floral arrangements in Washington Heights. They have been my go-to for every holiday."
settings.name: Diana L.

settings.quote: "Ordered last minute for my mom's birthday. Got a photo of the arrangement before delivery. Gorgeous, and at her door an hour later. Real local florist."
settings.name: Marcus G.

settings.quote: "Best florist in the Heights. They speak Spanish, they know my mom's name, and they stayed late so I could pick up flowers for a vigil. Family."
settings.name: Rosa M.

settings.headline: A florist that walks to your door.
settings.body: We hand-deliver across Washington Heights, Hudson Heights, Inwood, Marble Hill, and the Cloisters. Most orders go on foot from the shop on Fort Washington. Outside our zone? We ship same-day across upper Manhattan and the Bronx.

settings.eyebrow: Flowers as part of everyday life · Subscriptions
settings.headline: Fresh flowers, every Friday.
settings.body: A standing order from your neighborhood florist on Fort Washington. Three tiers (Casa, Familia, Estudio) starting at $60. Free hand-delivery across Washington Heights, Hudson Heights, and Inwood. First delivery comes with a free glass vase. Pause or skip any week.

settings.headline: "Your local flower shop, for moments that matter most."
settings.body:
Family-owned. Two decades. One block. Primavera has been on Fort Washington Avenue since 2004. Bilingual, family-run, built for the neighborhood. We take the A train down to the 28th Street Market most mornings and pick the day's stems ourselves.

The website is new. The shop is the same one that's been on the corner of 187th all along. Walk in for a single rose, call when you need a standing spray for Ortiz, or order online and we'll bring it by foot. Hablamos español. Te conocemos por nombre.
settings.signature_sub: Owners · Florists · Neighbors in Washington Heights since 2004
